Physical.name: FireSlash
Physical.description: A fiery sword attack.

Physical.name: VacuSlash
Physical.description: A sword attack enhanced by whirlwinds.

Physical.name: BoltSlash
Physical.description: A sword attack made stronger by lightning.

Physical.name: IceSlash
Physical.description: A sword attack made stronger by the power of ice.

Physical.name: NapAttack
Physical.description: A physical attack that may put the target to sleep. Mechanics: The damage inflicted is unaffected by the target's resistance. A monster affected by sleep cannot take action. Attacking the affected monster has a 50% chance to awaken them. The effect has a chance of wearing off each turn, and lasts up to 2 turns.

Physical.name: PoisonHit
Physical.description: A physical attack that may poison the target. Mechanics: The damage inflicted is unaffected by the target's resistance. A monster affected by poison will take damage after each of their actions. This effect will end after the battle. [Damage = min(50, 1 + Max HP / 8)]

Physical.name: Paralyze
Physical.description: A physical attack that may paralyze the target. Mechanics: A monster affected by paralyze will be permanently stunned. If the entire party is paralyzed you will automatically be wiped out. This effect will persist after the battle.

Physical.name: SquallHit
Physical.description: A physical attack that hits first.

Physical.name: BiAttack
Physical.description: A physical attack that strikes twice in succession.

Physical.name: QuadHits
Physical.description: A physical attack that strikes four times.

Physical.name: RainSlash
Physical.description: A sword attack that hits all enemies. Mechanics: Each attack is weaker than the last.

Physical.name: PsycheUp
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage at the end of the turn.

Physical.name: HighJump
Physical.description: The user leaps and attacks in the next turn. Mechanics: The monster is immune to everything while in the air.

Physical.name: EvilSlash
Physical.description: A powerful, but wildly aimed, sword attack. Mechanics: Inflict a critical attack with 5/8 accuracy.

Physical.name: Massacre
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on one friend or foe.

Physical.name: TwinSlash
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage, but also hurts the user. Mechanics: The user takes 25% of the damage inflicted.

Physical.name: Berserker
Physical.description: A powerful attack that leaves the user vulnerable. Mechanics: All damage inflicted and received is doubled after calculating resistances and DEF, damage over time effects are unaffected.

Physical.name: SlimeBlow
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the slime family.

Physical.name: DrakSlash
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the dragon family.

Physical.name: BeastCut
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the beast family.

Physical.name: BirdBlow
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the bird family.

Physical.name: BugBlow
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the bug family.

Physical.name: Shears
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the plant family.

Physical.name: DevilCut
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the devil family.

Physical.name: ZombieCut
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the zombie family.

Physical.name: CleanCut
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the materail family.

Physical.name: AquaCut
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the water family.

Physical.name: MetalCut
Physical.description: Inflicts damage on a high DEF enemy. Mechanics: Inflict 1-2 damage if the target's DEF is too high to inflict damage. If the target is a Metaly, Metabble, KingMetal, or GoldSlime, inflict 150% damage.

Physical.name: ChargeUp
Physical.description: Inflicts severe damage on the next turn. Mechanics: The user's next physical attack will inflict double damage. This effect can be used with other physical skills.

Physical.name: StrongD
Physical.description: Strongly protects the user against all attacks. Mechanics: Reduce all damage by 90%. This skill will take effect before any attacks can be used.

Physical.name: BladeD
Physical.description: Protects the user and enables retaliation. Mechanics: The user will inflict damage equal to double the damage received from any physical attacks this turn. This skill will take effect before any attacks can be used.

Physical.name: Dodge
Physical.description: Deflects any physical attack to another monster. Mechanics: All physical attacks that target the user will be redirected to an ally or enemy this turn. This skill will take effect before any attacks can be used.

Physical.name: Cover
Physical.description: Takes all attacks meant for another monster. Mechanics: The user will block all attacks for one ally, but will take multiple hits by skills that target the entire party. This skill will take effect before any attacks can be used.

Physical.name: Guardian
Physical.description: Takes all attacks meant for party monsters. Mechanics: The user will block all attacks for the party, but will take multiple hits by skills that target the entire party. This skill will take effect before any attacks can be used.

Spell.name: Blaze
Spell.description: Attack an enemy with a fireball.

Spell.name: Blazemore
Spell.description: Attack an enemy with a large fireball.

Spell.name: Blazemost
Spell.description: A towering pillar of fire roasts an enemy.

Spell.name: Firebal
Spell.description: Attacks enemies with a blast of fire (all).

Spell.name: Firebane
Spell.description: Attacks enemies with a wall of fire (all).

Spell.name: Firebolt
Spell.description: A huge wall of fire incinerates enemies (all).

Spell.name: Bang
Spell.description: Small explosions strike enemies (all).

Spell.name: Boom
Spell.description: A succession of explosions strikes enemies (all).

Spell.name: Explodet
Spell.description: Huge explosions blast enemies (all).

Spell.name: Infernos
Spell.description: Razor sharp whirlwinds slash enemies (all).

Spell.name: Infermore
Spell.description: Twisters tear through enemies (all).

Spell.name: Infermost
Spell.description: A huge tornado roars through enemies (all).

Spell.name: Bolt
Spell.description: Lightning strikes enemies (all).

Spell.name: Zap
Spell.description: Powerful bolts of lightning lash enemies (all).

Spell.name: Thordain
Spell.description: Huge shards of lightning rip enemies.

Spell.name: Icebolt
Spell.description: Small chunks of ice hail down on enemies (all).

Spell.name: SnowStorm
Spell.description: Enemies are flash frozen (all).

Spell.name: Blizzard
Spell.description: A wicked blizzard howls through enemies (all).

Spell.name: Beat
Spell.description: Instantly slays an enemy.

Spell.name: Defeat
Spell.description: Instantly slays enemies (all).

Spell.name: Sacrifice
Spell.description: The user explodes to inflict damage on all enemies. Mechanics: Kill or reduce the HP to 1 of each monster, then the user perishes or survives with 1% of their HP. The surival rate is about 3/8. This effect will always kill the affected monsters if they already had 1 HP, including the user.

Spell.name: Surround
Spell.description: Surrounds all enemies in a mirage. Mechanics: The affected monsters will have their physical attacks miss at a rate of 5/8.

Spell.name: Sleep
Spell.description: Makes a single enemy sleep. Mechanics: A monster affected by sleep cannot take action. Attacking the affected monster has a 50% chance to awaken them. The effect has a chance of wearing off each turn, and lasts up to 2 turns.

Spell.name: SleepAll
Spell.description: Makes all enemies sleep. Mechanics: A monster affected by sleep cannot take action. Attacking the affected monster has a 50% chance to awaken them. The effect has a chance of wearing off each turn, and lasts up to 2 turns.

Spell.name: RobMagic
Spell.description: Steals MP from an enemy. Mechanics: The affected monster will be drained of up to 29 MP.

Spell.name: TakeMagic
Spell.description: Absorbs the MP of a spell cast against the user.  Mechanics: The user gains MP equal to the MP cost spells and typeless/breath skills against it, does not work on skills used by your own monsters.

Spell.name: StopSpell
Spell.description: Prevents spell casting by all enemies. Mechanics: The affected monsters will have all of their spells nullified.

Spell.name: PanicAll
Spell.description: Confuses all enemies. Mechanics: The affected monsters may attack their allies with a basic attack. Each time the affected monster is attacked they have a chance to recover from this effect, and has a chance to recover each turn.

Spell.name: Sap
Spell.description: Lowers DEF of one enemy. Mechanics: The affected monster will have their DEF lowered by half of their base value. This effect can be applied until the value is reduced to 1.

Spell.name: Defense
Spell.description: Lowers DEF of all enemy monsters. Mechanics: The affected monsters will have their DEF lowered by half of their base value. This effect can be applied until the value is reduced to 1.

Spell.name: Slow
Spell.description: Lowers AGL of one enemy. Mechanics: The affected monster will have their AGL lowered by half of their base value. This effect can be applied until the value is reduced to 1.

Spell.name: SlowAll
Spell.description: Lowers AGL of all enemy monsters. Mechanics: The affected monsters will have their DEF lowered by half of their base value. This effect can be applied until the value is reduced to 1.

Spell.name: Upper
Spell.description: Raises DEF of one monster. Mechanics: The affected monster will have their DEF increased by half of their base value. This effect can be applied until the value is increased to 999.

Spell.name: Increase
Spell.description: Raises DEF of party monsters (all). Mechanics: The affected monsters will have their DEF increased by half of their base value. This effect can be applied until the value is increased to 999.

Spell.name: Speed
Spell.description: Raises AGL of one monster. Mechanics: The affected monster will have their AGL increased by half of their base value. This effect can be applied until the value is increased to 999.

Spell.name: SpeedUp
Spell.description: Raises AGL of party monsters (all). Mechanics: The affected monsters will have their AGL increased by half of their base value. This effect can be applied until the value is increased to 999.

Spell.name: TwinHits
Spell.description: Doubles the ATK of one monster. Mechanics: Does not increase ATK, despite the description. Double the damage of all physical attacks, after calculating DEF and resistances.

Spell.name: Barrier
Spell.description: Reduces damage from breath attacks (all). Mechanics: Reduce damage from all breath attacks by about 50% to your entire party. (Requires further testing, damage reduction may be lower or higher.)

Spell.name: MagicWall
Spell.description: Raises protection against magic spells (all). Mechanics: Reduce damage from all spell attacks by about 50% to your entire party. (Requires further testing, damage reduction may be lower or higher, and may affect more than just spells.)

Spell.name: MagicBack
Spell.description: Bounces back a spell once. Mechanics: The user generates a veil that will reflect back the next enemy spell that will affect it. Once a spell has been reflected the effect will end. If a spell targets the entire party, only the effect that affects the user will be reflected back and other party members will still be affected. (Requires further testing, may reflect more than just spells.)

Spell.name: Bounce
Spell.description: Bounces back all enemy spells. Mechanics: The user generates a veil that will reflect back enemy spells that affect it. If a spell targets the entire party, only the effect that affects the user will be reflected back and other party members will still be affected. (Requires further testing, may reflect more than just spells.)

Spell.name: Ironize
Spell.description: Changes all party monsters into chunks of iron. Mechanics: Transform the entire party into iron and become immune to all attacks and effects for 3 turns, including the turn it was cast. The affected monsters cannot act while they are transformed.

Spell.name: Transform
Spell.description: Transform the user into a chosen enemy. Mechanics: Copy an enemy's HP, ATK, DEF, AGL, Resistances, and Skills. Your HP will increase or decrease to the enemy's current HP. Enemy monsters can only have up to 3 skills, but all of your skills will be replaced by them, even if you posses more than 3. If copying another player's monster, you may be able to copy more skills. Any equipped items you posses will have their effects reapplied after the transformation.

Spell.name: BeDragon
Spell.description: Transform the user into a ferocious dragon. Mechanics: Transform the user into DracoLord(2) with new stats, skills, and resistances. If your current MP is above 300 it will be reduced to 300, but if it is equal to 300 or less then it will remain the same value. Unlike other games of the series, the user remains controllable.

Spell.name: Chance
Spell.description: There is no telling what may happen. Mechanics: Randomly applies 1 of 12 effects. Rate Effect 2% BeDragon is applied to the user, same effect as the spell. 3% Restore 999 MP to all allies. 5% Meteors fall and brutalize all allies and enemies, reducing their HP to 1 or killing them if their current HP is already 1. 6% Drain the MP of all monsters to 0. 6% Freeze all enemies, stunning them for 1 turn. 6% Sleep is applied onto all allies and enemies, ignoring resistances. 8% ThickFog is apllied, and lasts 3 turns. 9% Restore 999 HP to all allies. 11% Fills your entire party with power, causing their next physical attack to critical. 17% Summons Gaint - Attacks all enemies, weak. Foul Being - Forces all enemies to flee. ??? - Shatters all enemies? Despite looking like they died, the game tells you they fled, so you receive no experience.  18% Nothing happens...

Spell.name: Heal
Spell.description: Restores HP by 30~40.

Spell.name: HealMore
Spell.description: Restores HP by 75~90.

Spell.name: HealAll
Spell.description: Fully restores HP.

Spell.name: HealUs
Spell.description: Restores HP by 90~120 (all).

Spell.name: HealUsAll
Spell.description: Fully restores HP (all).

Spell.name: MPass
Spell.description: Gives 15MP to a party monster.

Spell.name: MPassmore
Spell.description: Gives 30MP to a party monster.

Spell.name: MPassmost
Spell.description: Gives 80MP to a party monster.

Spell.name: Vivify
Spell.description: May revive a dead monster. Mechanics: Revive a monster with a success rate of 5/8. Monsters revive with 1 HP.

Spell.name: Revive
Spell.description: Revives a dead monster. Mechanics: Does not fail, and monsters revive with 100% of their HP.

Spell.name: Farewell
Spell.description: Revives dead mates in exchnage for own life (all). Mechanics: Revive all allies with 100% of their HP, then the user perishes or survives with 1% of their current HP. The survival rate is about 3/8. The user will always perish if their HP is already at 1.

Spell.name: Antidote
Spell.description: Cures one monster of poison.

Spell.name: DeChaos
Spell.description: Clears confusion in all party monsters.

Spell.name: CurseOff
Spell.description: Lifts a curse (all).

Spell.name: NumbOff
Spell.description: Cures paralysis and sleep (all).

Normal.name: WindBeast
Normal.description: Slashes a single monster with sharp whirlwinds. Mechanics: Damage scales linearly based on level.

Normal.name: Vacuum
Normal.description: Creates a tornado with vicious winds (all). Mechanics: Damage scales linearly based on level. (Yes, the damage range for level 19, resistance 1, is correct. I have no idea why the damage range is higher than resistance 0. I've done hundreds of tests to make sure. The damage will eventually scale to inflict less damage than resistance 0.)

Normal.name: MultiCut
Normal.description: A cross-cutting sword attack (all). Mechanics: Inflict about 50% more damage vs Zombie family. (Requires more testing, bonus damage vs zombies may not be accurate.)

Normal.name: Lightning
Normal.description: Summons a lightning storm (all). Mechanics: Damage scales linearly based on level.

Normal.name: Hellblast
Normal.description: Strikes all enemies with huge lightning.

Normal.name: Ramming
Normal.description: A full-body tackle that also hurts the user. Mechanics: Inflict damage equal to 80% of the target's current HP, then the user takes 1 + 80% of the user's current HP in damage. This skill will kill the user if their HP is already at 1.

Normal.name: Kamikaze
Normal.description: Leaves the user and target on the verge of death. Mechanics: Reduce the target's HP to 1, then the user's HP is reduced to 1. This skill will kill the user if their HP is already at 1.

Normal.name: MegaMagic
Normal.description: The ultimate attack spell. Mechanics: This is NOT a spell, despite the description. No monster is immune to this skill, and cannot be bred to be immune to it. [Damage = (100 + MP * 2) +-10%]

Normal.name: CallHelp
Normal.description: Summons friends who attack in droves. Mechanics: Damage scales linearly based on level. Calls 1~4 helpers to randomly attack enemies. The skill has a 5/8 chance of success.

Normal.name: YellHelp
Normal.description: Summons a mass of friends that attack in droves. Mechanics: Damage scales linearly based on level. Calls 1~8 helpers to randomly attack enemies. The skill has a 5/8 chance of success.

Normal.name: WaterShot
Normal.description: Shoots a high volume of water at an enemy.

Normal.name: Tidalwave
Normal.description: Summons a towering wall of water (all).

Normal.name: Geyser
Normal.description: Opens a geyser to send an enemy flying. Mechanics: Launches an enemy into the air, and if they have yet to take an action this turn then they lose their turn to act. Once in the air, the enemy will fall back down will land safely or awkwardly. If the monster lands awkwardly then they will take about 10% of their max HP in damage. The monster has a 5/8 chance of landing safely. The success rate for this skill only applies for launching the enemy into the air.

Support.name: Radiant
Support.description: A blast of light blinds all the enemies. Mechanics: The affected monsters will have their physical attacks miss at a rate of 5/8.

Support.name: SandStorm
Support.description: Obscures the visibility of all enemies.  Mechanics: The affected monsters will have their physical attacks miss at a rate of 5/8.

Support.name: EerieLite
Support.description: Weakens all enemies to magic spells. Mechanics: The affected monsters will take 25-50% more damage from spells and typeless/breath skills. The more resistant a monster is to a skill the greater the damage modifier.

Support.name: UltraDown
Support.description: Greatly weakens an enemy. Mechanics: The affected monster will have the effects of Sap, Slow, and Surround applied to it, ignoring the resistances of these skills.

Support.name: LushLicks
Support.description: Licks one enemy to stop it for one turn.

Support.name: SickLicks
Support.description: Licks one enemy to reduce its DEF. Mechanics: The affected monster will have their DEF lowered to 1, and be stunned for 1 turn.

Support.name: Curse
Support.description: Lays a curse on all enemies. Mechanics: Monsters affected by curse will have a 5/8 chance to be stunned or lose HP equal to their max HP divided by 6. This effect will persist after the battle.

Support.name: LegSweep
Support.description: Sweeps the leg out from under one enemy. Mechanics: The affected monster will be stunned for 1 turn. Flying monsters are immune to this skill.

Support.name: BigTrip
Support.description: Sweep the legs out from under all enemies. Mechanics: The affected monsters will be stunned for 1 turn. Flying monsters are immune to this skill.

Support.name: Ahhh
Support.description: Soft, plushy and very pleasant. Mechanics: If the user is a male, inflict damage equal to a basic attack, ignoring the target's resistance. If the user is a female, stun an enemy for 1 turn.

Support.name: WarCry
Support.description: A terrifying cry that stops all enemies. Mechanics: The affected monsters will be stunned for 1 turn.

Support.name: MouthShut
Support.description: Prevents all enemies from using breath attacks. Mechanics: The affected monsters will have all of their breath skills nullified.

Support.name: SealPray
Support.description: Seals a skill used by the enemy. Mechanics: The next skill used after the user's turn will be sealed. If any monster tries to use this skill, it will be nullified. If this skill is used again, the sealed skill will be replaced by the new one.

Support.name: DeMagic
Support.description: Lifts the effects of all spells on enemies (all). Mechanics: Nullify the effects of all support skills, both negative and positive, on all enemies. SealPray is unaffected by this skill.

Support.name: ThickFog
Support.description: Creates a fog that prevents the use of all spells. Mechanics: Nullify the effects of all support skills, both negative and positive, on all allies and enemies. All spells will be nullified for the next 3 turns, including the turn this skill was used. SealPray is unaffected by this skill.

Support.name: Focus
Support.description: Enables two moves in the next turn. Mechanics: The user will perform the same action twice on their next turn. If a skill is used, the monster will require enough MP to use the skill twice. If you run out of MP then your second action will be wasted. Skills that require 2 or more turns to use will only be used once. Support skills that provide a one time effect, like AquaWall, will be used twice, but provide no benefit. Lastly, skills like Transform, BeDragon, and Ironize will only be used once.

Support.name: Imitate
Support.description: Imitates the enemy's moves. Mechanics: The user will retaliate and copy all attacks this turn. This skill will take effect before any attacks can be used.

Support.name: TailWind
Support.description: Bounces back a breath attack to an enemy. Mechanics: Any breath skill that would affect the user, this turn, is returned back and the user is unaffected by it. This does not protect the entire party from breath skills, only the user, and the breath skill is only returned back to the enemy who used it, not all enemies. You may only return one breath skill back per turn. This skill will take effect before any attacks can be used.

Support.name: StormWind
Support.description: Bounces back all breath attacks to all enemies. Mechanics: Any breath skill that would affect the user, this turn, is returned back and the user is unaffected by it. This does not protect the entire party from breath skills, only the user, and the breath skill is only returned back to the enemy who used it, not all enemies. You aren't limited by the amount of breath skills you can return. This skill will take effect before any attacks can be used.

Support.name: AquaWall
Support.description: Creates a barrier that blocks an attack. Mechanics: The user erects a barrier that can block any attack or skill, including criticals. Once an attack or skill is blocked, the effect will end. The barrier will only protect the user against skills that target the entire party.

Healing.name: LoveRain
Healing.description: Summons rain that restores HP. Mechanics: The user has a 5/8 chance to restores 20~100% HP to all allies on their next turn.

Healing.name: LifeSong
Healing.description: Revives all dead friends in the next turn. Mechanics: The user has a 5/8 chance to revive all allies with full HP on their next turn.

Healing.name: Surge
Healing.description: Eliminates all status problems among friends. Mechanics: Remove all negative effects on your party.

Breath.name: FireAir
Breath.description: Inflicts damage with a breath of fire (all).

Breath.name: BlazeAir
Breath.description: Inflicts damage with a blast of fire (all).

Breath.name: Scorching
Breath.description: Inflicts damage with a huge blast of fire (all).

Breath.name: FrigidAir
Breath.description: Inflicts damage with a breath of ice (all).

Breath.name: IceAir
Breath.description: Inflicts damage with a freezing breath (all).

Breath.name: IceStorm
Breath.description: Inflicts damage by exhaling a blizzard (all).

Breath.name: WhiteAir
Breath.description: Looses a white, shining breath of ice (all).

Breath.name: SleepAir
Breath.description: A breath that induces sleep in all enemies. Mechanics: A monster affected by sleep cannot take action. Attacking the affected monster has a 50% chance to awaken them. The effect has a chance of wearing off each turn, and lasts up to 2 turns.

Breath.name: PoisonGas
Breath.description: A breath that poisons all enemies. Mechanics: A monster affected by poison will take damage after each of their actions. This effect will end after the battle. [Damage = min(50, 1 + Max HP / 8)]

Breath.name: PoisonAir
Breath.description: A breath that badly poisons all enemies. Mechanics: The affected monsters will be inflicted with a strong poison that will also inflict 1 damage for each step you walk. This effect will persist after the battle. [Damage = 1 + Max HP / 5]

Breath.name: PalsyAir
Breath.description: A breath that paralyzes all enemies. Mechanics: A monster affected by paralyze will be permanently stunned. If the entire party is paralyzed you will automatically be wiped out. This effect will persist after the battle.

Breath.name: SuckAir
Breath.description: Holds in a breath to inflict severe damage next turn. Mechanics: The user's next breath attack will inflict double damage.

Breath.name: SuckAll
Breath.description: Inhales all breath attacks meant for the party. Mechanics: Nullify all breath skills for one round. This skill will take effect before any attacks can be used.

Dance.name: K.O.Dance
Dance.description: A dance that induces death in all enemies.

Dance.name: OddDance
Dance.description: A dance that reduces an enemy's MP. Mechanics: The affected monster will lose up to 29 MP.

Dance.name: RobDance
Dance.description: A dance that steals an enemy's MP. Mechanics: The affected monster will be drained of up to 29 MP.

Dance.name: PaniDance
Dance.description: A dance that confuses all enemies. Mechanics: The affected monsters may attack their allies with a basic attack. Each time the affected monster is attacked they have a chance to recover from this effect, and has a chance to recover each turn.

Dance.name: LureDance
Dance.description: A dance that makes all enemies want to join in. Mechanics: The affected monsters will be stunned for 1 turn.

Dance.name: DanceShut
Dance.description: Prevents all enemies from dancing. Mechanics: The affected monsters will have all of their dance skills nullified.

Dance.name: SideStep
Dance.description: A quick-footed skill for dodging attacks. Mechanics: The user will evade physical attacks at a rate of 5/8 this turn. This effect will take place before any offensive skills can be used.

Dance.name: Hustle
Dance.description: A dance that restores HP by 70~80 (all).

Dance.name: LifeDance
Dance.description: A sacrificial dance to revive dead friends. Mechanics: Revive all allies to full HP, then the user perishes or survives with 1% HP. This effect will always kill the user if they already had 1 HP.

Field.name: Whistle
Field.description: Attracts enemy monsters. Mechanics: Instantly initiate a monster encounter of the area.

Field.name: Pheromone
Field.description: Attracts enemy monsters of the opposite gender. Mechanics: Instantly initiate a monster encounter of the area with monsters that are of the opposite gender of the user.

Field.name: StepGuard
Field.description: Protects the party from injurious terrain.

Field.name: Outside
Field.description: Instantly warps the party out from caves and towers.

Field.name: Informer
Field.description: Use to obtain Information on monsters. Mechanics: This skill will only inform you of up to 7 kinds of monsters in the area. Some areas may have more than 7 kinds of monsters, so don't solely rely on this skill to find monsters in the area.

Field.name: Erand
Field.description: Makes the monster run an errand for 100G Mechanics: Pay 100G to fetch a randomly generate item in the area. The types of items that can be obtained are the same you find on the ground of the world, cave, tower, or dungeon you are currently in.

Field.name: EagleEye
Field.description: Determines the presence of items nearby. Mechanics: Gives you a very vague idea of where items are. A completely useless skill, and you are better off just exploring without it.

Field.name: MapMagic
Field.description: Checks the surrounding area's terrain. Mechanics: Reveals the entire map, and shows towns, castles, caves, towers, and dungeons on the map.A very useful skill for exploring key worlds.
